import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_order(customer, order):
    logger.debug(
        "Processing order order_id=%s customer_id=%s item_count=%d",
        order.order_id,
        customer.customer_id,
        len(order.line_items),
    )
    total = sum(item["price"] * item["qty"] for item in order.line_items)
    logger.debug("Order total calculated: order_id=%s total=%.2f", order.order_id, total)
